_comment: Scoped interaction allowlist (issue #199, ADR-0022). Copy to %ProgramData%\Imperion\interaction-allowlist.json and fill in. The `principals` list is the CONFIG-DRIVEN set of Imperion principals whose mail / Teams chat with clients is captured. The set changes WITHOUT a code release. v1 = Derek Rankin + Mark Connelly; replace the placeholder UPNs below with the real mailbox UPNs. Only `upn` is read (case-insensitive); `displayName` and `notes` are for the human editor and are ignored. This file is NOT committed (real UPNs are employee identifiers) — only this .example.json ships.

principals.notes: Imperion mailbox whose client interactions are captured.
Imperion mailbox whose client interactions are captured.
